issue_title: Ground units cannot rearm without `Repairable:` trait
issue_body:
For a ground unit to rearm it also needs to be repairable from the same structure. Without `Repairable:` trait the rearm cursor won't even show up.

Easy reproduction case: add `-Repairable:` to minelayer
pr_body:
Supersedes #16470
Closes #16403 
Closes #12463
Closes #20065 
Closes #20066
Closes #15023
Closes #15969
Closes #13654
Closes #12493

Related #19316, #18313, #17452, #16890, #16712, #18313, #16145, #19092,  #16664

This PR completely refactors docking logic. This unifies harvester, repairable, rearmable and some of the aircraft code. The goal is to make docking logic flexible and reusable.

New architecture: 

- For dock validity checks I replace actor ID hash sets, with flexible BitSet<DockType>. As defined in https://github.com/OpenRA/OpenRA/pull/16470#issuecomment-489329382
- Docking structures will now have `Dock` trait. It has all the definitions one would expect as `Type`, `Offset`, `Facing` etc. 
- `Refinery`, `TiberianSunRefinery` and `Reservable` traits removed, with `RepairsUnits` appearing just as an info trait
- Order handling moved to new `DockManager` from `Harvester`, `Repairable`, `Rearmable`, `Aircraft`
- Removed `TransformsIntoRepairable`, `RearmableNear`
- `Harvester`, `Repairable`, `Rearmable` inherit a new abstract class `DockableBase`, which inherits `IDockable` interface. Via this interface `DockManager` manages docking
- `DeliverResources` activity renamed to `DockActivity`
- `HarvesterDockSequence` activity renamed to `DockSequence`
- `ReturnToBase` and `Resupply` activities merged into `DockActivity` and `DockSequence`

This PR is too massive to review, so I'm going to split it up into smaller PR's like it was done with HPF and Networking PR's. When it comes to reviewing specifically this PR, don't. After a few weeks in production it's still not ready. There's still a bunch of bugs and quicks that need to be ironed out, as well more refactoring to be done
